scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:cli && npm run build:web
scripts.build:all-sites: npm run build:www && npm run build:json && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @rediacc/shared && npm run build -w @rediacc/shared-desktop && npm run build -w @rediacc/provisioning
scripts.install:natives: npm rebuild electron node-pty ssh2 cpu-features esbuild --foreground-scripts --ignore-scripts=false
scripts.check:ci-account-no-admin-role: ! grep -rn "enum.*customer.*admin\|enum.*admin.*customer" private/account/src/db/schema.ts private/account/src/types/user.ts 2>/dev/null; echo 'OK: no admin user role'
scripts.check:ci-account-scope-audit: cd private/account && npx vitest run tests/integration/scope-audit.test.ts --reporter=dot
scripts.check:ci-account-config-auth: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const c=fs.readFileSync('private/account/src/routes/configs.ts','utf8');const lines=c.split('\n');let ok=true;lines.forEach((l,i)=>{if(l.includes('configTokenAuth()')){const ctx=lines.slice(i,i+5).join(' ');if(!ctx.includes('requireOrgMembership()')){console.error('FAIL: configTokenAuth() without requireOrgMembership() near line '+(i+1));ok=false}}});if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('OK: all configTokenAuth() calls paired with requireOrgMembership()')"
scripts.check:i18n: tsx scripts/check-translation-hashes.ts && tsx scripts/check-translation-completeness.ts && tsx scripts/check-translation-key-usage.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-inline-translations.ts && tsx scripts/check-www-only-translations.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-untranslated-text.ts && tsx scripts/check-account-email-templates.ts && npm run validate:cli-docs -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:docs-cli-usage -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:landing-cli-usage -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:translation-freshness -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:content -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:content-accuracy -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:comparison-refs -w @rediacc/www && tsx scripts/check-component-hardcoded-strings.ts --strict && npm run check:cli-docs && tsx scripts/check-i18n-naturalization.ts
scripts.check:lint: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eslint packages scripts private/account --max-warnings 0 && biome lint private/account/ --error-on-warnings
scripts.check:types: tsc -b packages/shared packages/shared-desktop packages/provisioning packages/cli packages/desktop packages/e2e && npm run typecheck -w @rediacc/web && tsc --noEmit -p private/account/tsconfig.json
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @rediacc/shared && npm run clean -w @rediacc/cli && npm run clean -w @rediacc/web
scripts.dev:parity: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @rediacc/web
scripts.fix: npm run fix:format && npm run fix:lint
scripts.fix:all: npm run fix:format && npm run fix:lint && npm run fix:unused && npm run fix:i18n
scripts.fix:lint: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eslint packages scripts private/account --fix && biome lint --fix private/account/
scripts.ci: npm run check:version && npm run check:deps && npm run lint && npm run check:lint && npm run lint:unused && npm run check:format && npm run check:i18n && npm run check:types && npm run check:test && npm run check:test-cli && npm run check:test-workers && npm run check:ci-install-sh-config && npm run check:ci-npmrc && npm run check:ci-lockfile && npm run check:ci-peer-deps && npm run check:ci-security-audit && npm run check:ci-shell-lint && npm run check:ci-shell-format && npm run check:ci-shell-commands && npm run check:ci-workflows && npm run check:ci-compose-env && npm run check:ci-e2e-coverage && npm run check:ci-audit-coverage && npm run check:ci-config-migrations && npm run check:ci-editorconfig && npm run check:ci-account-portal && npm run check:ci-account-server && npm run check:ci-account-layer-isolation && npm run check:ci-account-config-auth && npm run check:ci-account-no-admin-role && npm run check:ci-account-scope-audit && npm run check:ci-renet && npm run check:ci-no-otlp-creds && npm run check:ci-subscription-schema && npm run check:ci-pricing-consistency && npm run check:ci-seo && npm run check:ci-external-links && npm run check:ci-dkim-notify && npm run check:ci-redirects && npm run check:ci-search-index && npm run check:ci-cta-bolt && npm run check:ci-content-quality && npm run check:ci-nis2-quotes && npm run check:cli-examples && npm run check:ci-tutorial-parity && npm run check:ci-tutorial-casts && npm run check:ci-locale-tutorial-assets && npm run check:ci-solution-videos && npm run check:ci-tutorial-caption-sync
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/shared-desktop packages/provisioning packages/cli packages/desktop packages/e2e && npm run typecheck -w @rediacc/web && tsc --noEmit -p private/account/tsconfig.json

_overridesReasons.glob: BLOCKER: force glob ^11 everywhere to avoid deprecated transitive glob <9 chain pulled in via old eslint/electron paths
_overridesReasons.rimraf: BLOCKER: force rimraf ^6 to avoid unmaintained v2/v3 transitive chains from older tooling (electron-builder plist, etc.)
_overridesReasons.inflight: BLOCKER: replace unmaintained inflight with @isaacs/inflight; original package is unsupported and leaks memory
_overridesReasons.@npmcli/move-file: BLOCKER: redirect to @npmcli/fs which is the supported successor; bare package archived since npm 7
_overridesReasons.rollup: BLOCKER: pin rollup ^4.59 to ensure all workspaces resolve the same native binary set and avoid platform-specific optional-dep drift
_overridesReasons.fast-xml-parser: BLOCKER: pin 5.9.3 (raised from 5.8.0 for @astrojs/rss 4.0.19) to carry the CDATA/comment injection fix (GHSA-gh4j-gqv2-49f6) plus the entity-expansion limit family; without the pin transitive consumers drift below the fixed range
_overridesReasons.flatted: BLOCKER: force >=3.4.2 to pick up prototype pollution fix landed after vitest/@vitest transitive pin held older versions
_overridesReasons.smol-toml: BLOCKER: force >=1.6.1 to pick up DoS-via-commented-lines fix; astro toolchain otherwise pulls older transitive versions
_overridesReasons.h3: BLOCKER: force >=1.15.9 to include SSE carriage-return sanitization + path traversal fixes; upstream astro/nitro transitives lag
_overridesReasons.yaml: BLOCKER: force >=2.8.3 to include stack-overflow-on-deeply-nested-collections fix; astro transitive chain otherwise holds tree at older version
_overridesReasons.lodash: BLOCKER: force >=4.17.22 to pick up latest prototype-pollution defensive patches; upstream lodash is effectively unmaintained
_overridesReasons.svgo: BLOCKER: pin ^4.0.1 to avoid the multiple older v2/v3 transitive versions pulled in via astro icon pipeline
_overridesReasons.devalue: BLOCKER: force ^5.8.1 to include GHSA-77vg-94rm-hx3p (DoS via sparse array deserialization) fix; astro 5.x pulls 5.6.x by default which is in the affected range >=5.6.3, <=5.8.0
_overridesReasons.dayjs: BLOCKER: pin ^1.11.20 to match antd pro-components internal expectations and avoid transitive version drift
_overridesReasons.hono: BLOCKER: force >=4.12.25 to carry the >=4.12.18 fixes plus serve-static path traversal (GHSA-wwfh-h76j-fc44), CORS wildcard reflection (GHSA-88fw-hqm2-52qc), Set-Cookie merge (GHSA-j6c9-x7qj-28xf), body-limit bypass (GHSA-rv63-4mwf-qqc2), and Lambda@Edge header drop (GHSA-wgpf-jwqj-8h8p); @modelcontextprotocol/sdk transitively pulls older hono
_overridesReasons.@hono/node-server: BLOCKER: force >=1.19.13 to pair with hono >=4.12.25 override; pre-1.19 cannot start against hono 4.12.x
_overridesReasons.undici: BLOCKER: force >=7.28.0 to resolve SOCKS5 proxy TLS bypass (GHSA-vmh5-mc38-953g), Set-Cookie injection (GHSA-p88m-4jfj-68fv), WebSocket DoS (GHSA-vxpw-j846-p89q), cross-origin pool reuse (GHSA-hm92-r4w5-c3mj), response queue poisoning (GHSA-35p6-xmwp-9g52), SameSite downgrade (GHSA-g8m3-5g58-fq7m), and cache whitespace bypass (GHSA-pr7r-676h-xcf6)
_overridesReasons.jsdom: BLOCKER: jsdom@29 depends on undici ^7.x and imports the internal module 'undici/lib/handler/wrap-handler.js', which was removed in undici 8. Nest a ^7.28.0 override inside jsdom so the rest of the tree can still satisfy the global >=7.28.0 security override while jsdom's worker threads resolve a compatible undici copy.
_overridesReasons.vite: BLOCKER: bound >=6.4.2 <8 to capture dev-server path-traversal + fs.deny fixes while staying compatible with vitest/@vitest 3.x and the astro stack; vite 8 release is a breaking major we have not planned for
_overridesReasons.follow-redirects: BLOCKER: force ^1.16.0 to include GHSA-r4q5-vmmm-2653 fix; axios 1.15.0 range ^1.15.11 permits 1.16.0 but the lockfile would otherwise freeze at 1.15.11
_overridesReasons.postcss: BLOCKER: force >=8.5.10 to include GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 XSS-via-unescaped-style-tag fix; vite/marpit transitives otherwise hold tree at 8.5.8
_overridesReasons.fast-uri: BLOCKER: force >=3.1.2 to include GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 (encoded path-separator normalization) and GHSA-v39h-62p7-jpjc (encoded authority delimiter) fixes; transitive consumers (fastify-swagger, ajv-formats) otherwise hold older versions
_overridesReasons.@xmldom/xmldom: BLOCKER: force >=0.8.13 to include GHSA-2v35-w6hq-6mfw (DOM recursion DoS), GHSA-f6ww-3ggp-fr8h (DocumentType serialization XSS), GHSA-x6wf-f3px-wcqx (PI injection), and GHSA-j759-j44w-7fr8 (comment injection) fixes; electron-builder/plist transitively pulls 0.8.12
_overridesReasons.fast-xml-builder: BLOCKER: force >=1.1.7 to include GHSA-5wm8-gmm8-39j9 attribute-quote injection fix; aws-sdk @aws-sdk/xml-builder transitively pulls older fast-xml-parser/fast-xml-builder
_overridesReasons.ip-address: BLOCKER: force ^10.1.1 to include GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g (XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods) fix; express-rate-limit@8.3.1 pulls 10.1.0 which is in the affected <= 10.1.0 range
_overridesReasons.protobufjs: BLOCKER: force >=7.5.6 to clear the 7.x advisories (GHSA-66ff/2pr8/fx83/75px/jvwf/685m/q6x5/xq3m all affected <= 7.5.5) — npm picks 8.2.0+ for the otlp-transformer chain which also clears the 8.0.0-8.0.1 critical RCE; @opentelemetry/sdk-node is pinned in .syncpackrc.json so we cannot bump the outer tree
_overridesReasons.@grpc/proto-loader: BLOCKER: nested override pins protobufjs ^7.5.6 inside the @grpc/proto-loader chain since proto-loader@0.8.x requires the 7.x major and cannot accept 8.x; pairs with the outer protobufjs >=7.5.6 override which handles the 8.x consumers
_overridesReasons.zod: BLOCKER: force ^4.4.3 across the whole tree so @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and the cli workspace share the same physical zod copy; without the override the SDK satisfies its 'zod: ^3.25 || ^4.0' range with the older zod@3.25.x that other transitives drag in, creating two zod installs whose v4/core $ZodType interfaces TS treats as distinct nominal types (build breaks at registerTool inputSchema)
_overridesReasons.astro: BLOCKER: astro's config validator (validateConfigRefined) was written against zod v3 and calls config.image.remotePatterns.length on the parsed shape; under the root zod ^4.4.3 override it gets undefined and the build crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading length)'. Nest a zod ^3.25.76 override scoped to astro to match astro's own peer dep declaration. @astrojs/sitemap and @astrojs/rss already declare zod ^4 themselves so they stay on the root override.
_overridesReasons.plist: BLOCKER: force ^3.1.1 across the whole tree because electron-builder ships an internal app-builder-lib/node_modules/plist@3.1.0 that calls DOMParser.parseFromString(xml) without a mimeType; @xmldom/xmldom >=0.9 requires the mimeType argument and throws 'the provided mimeType undefined is not valid' otherwise — observed on desktop mac-arm64 build. plist 3.1.1 passes 'text/xml' explicitly.
_overridesReasons.js-yaml: BLOCKER: force >=4.2.0 <5.0.0 to include GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68 (quadratic-complexity DoS via repeated merge-key aliases) fix while staying off the v5 major; electron-updater/@astrojs/markdown-remark/astro transitively pull js-yaml@4.1.1, and @astrojs/markdown-remark's `import yaml from "js-yaml"` default import breaks under js-yaml 5.x's ESM-only export shape (observed as a hard `astro build` SyntaxError)
_overridesReasons.gray-matter: BLOCKER: nested override pins js-yaml ^3.15.0 inside the gray-matter chain since gray-matter's frontmatter parser is written against the js-yaml v3 API and cannot accept v4; GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68 covers two disjoint ranges (>=4.0.0 <=4.1.1 AND <3.15.0), so the v3 line also needed bumping to its final 3.15.0 patch release
_overridesReasons.linkify-it: BLOCKER: force >=5.0.1 to include GHSA-22p9-wv53-3rq4 (quadratic-complexity DoS in LinkifyIt#match) fix; markdown-it (via @marp-team/marpit) transitively pulls linkify-it@5.0.0
